import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import { useAuth } from '../context/AuthContext'; import Navbar from '../components/common/Navbar'; import './Dashboard.css'; export default function Dashboard() { const { user } = useAuth(); const [usdtPrice, setUsdtPrice] = useState(null); const [wallet, setWallet] = useState(''); useEffect(() => { fetch('https://api.binance.com/api/v3/ticker/price?symbol=USDTUSDT') .catch(() => {}); fetch('https://api.coingecko.com/api/v3/simple/price?ids=tether&vs_currencies=usd,bob') .then(res => res.json()) .then(data => setUsdtPrice(data?.tether?.bob || 6.91)) .catch(() => setUsdtPrice(6.91)); }, []); return (

Bienvenido, {user?.nombre}

Panel de control — {user?.tipo_usuario}

{/* CRYPTO SECTION */}
Finanzas y Crypto
💱

Precio USDT / BOB

{usdtPrice ? `Bs. ${usdtPrice}` : 'Cargando...'}

Tasa de mercado en tiempo real

👛

Mi Wallet USDT

{wallet ? (
{wallet}
) : ( setWallet(e.target.value)} /> )}
